covers.prompt: A grey tabby cat lying on a person's chest, eyes gently closed, face in close-up, subtle throat vibration visible in the fur. Light: warm amber lamplight from the right, soft evening interior, bokeh background of a cozy Russian apartment living room. Camera: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, very shallow depth of field, fur texture sharp. Composition: cat's face fills left two-thirds, negative space on right, slightly low angle to capture the trust in the pose. Style: editorial magazine photography, ultra realistic, National Geographic animal portrait level. Color: warm earth tones, cream and amber, soft contrast. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts, no humans visible. 16:9 cinematic crop.
